name: email-agent
description: Processes incoming emails for Unite-Hub. Extracts sender data, identifies communication intents, links to CRM contacts, analyzes sentiment, and updates contact records with AI insights.
capabilities: Fetch and process unprocessed emails from workspace
Extract sender information and link to existing CRM contacts
Identify communication intents (inquiry, proposal, complaint, question, followup, meeting)
Update contact records with AI-generated scores and interaction notes
Create complete audit logs for all processing actions
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: Pure documentation/prompt file containing AI instructions for email processing. No executable code, no scripts, no file system access, and no network calls defined. Behavior matches stated purpose exactly. All static findings are false positives triggered by markdown code formatting and metadata strings.
valueStatement: Manually processing incoming emails wastes hours of valuable time. The Email Agent automatically extracts sender data, identifies communication intents, analyzes sentiment, and updates your CRM contacts with AI insights.
limitations: Requires Convex backend integration for email fetching and contact management
Cannot access email accounts directly; processes emails already stored in database
Limited to predefined intent keywords; may miss nuanced communication
Sentiment analysis is keyword-based; contextual sarcasm may not be detected

useCases.title: Qualify inbound leads
useCases.description: Automatically identify and score leads from incoming emails based on intent and sentiment analysis.

useCases.title: Route support requests
useCases.description: Detect complaint emails and automatically flag high-priority support issues for immediate response.

useCases.title: Track partnership inquiries
useCases.description: Monitor and categorize partnership and collaboration requests to build relationship timelines.

promptTemplates.title: Basic email processing
promptTemplates.prompt: Process emails for my workspace. Fetch all unprocessed emails, analyze each one for sender, intents, and sentiment, then link contacts and update records.

promptTemplates.title: Filter by sentiment
promptTemplates.prompt: Process emails and identify all positive sentiment emails with inquiry or partnership intent. List the contacts I should prioritize.

promptTemplates.title: Create followup list
promptTemplates.prompt: Process today's emails and generate a followup list with meeting requests and high-value inquiries. Include contact details and recommended actions.

promptTemplates.title: Weekly email digest
promptTemplates.prompt: Process all emails from the past week. Provide a summary of total processed, sentiment breakdown, top intents detected, and new contacts created.

bestPractices: Process emails regularly to keep CRM contact scores current and accurate
Review sentiment-analyzed emails daily to catch negative customer feedback early
Use the audit logs to track agent performance and identify processing errors
antiPatterns: Processing emails without checking for high-priority negative sentiment first
Ignoring new contact creation; always verify linked contacts are correct
Skipping audit logs; they are essential for compliance and troubleshooting

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: Works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Optimized for Claude Opus and Sonnet for best intent analysis accuracy.

faq.question: How many emails can it process at once?
faq.answer: Default limit is 50 emails per batch. Increase limit for large inboxes or decrease for faster processing.

faq.question: Does it integrate with Gmail or Outlook?
faq.answer: No direct integration. The skill processes emails already stored in a Convex database. Use a sync tool to import emails first.

faq.question: Is my email data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. All processing happens within your workspace. No email data is sent to external services beyond your configured backend.

faq.question: What if sentiment analysis is wrong?
faq.answer: Review flagged contacts after processing. The AI score is a suggestion; manually adjust contact scores and notes as needed.

faq.question: How does this differ from email filters?
faq.answer: Unlike basic filters, this agent understands context, extracts intent, analyzes tone, and updates CRM records automatically.
